mapper.sql: w.id, w.rule_id AS ruleId, w.warning_type AS warningType, w.member_id AS memberId, w.coach_id AS coachId, w.store_id AS storeId, DATE_FORMAT(w.period_start, '%Y-%m-%d') AS periodStart, DATE_FORMAT(w.period_end, '%Y-%m-%d') AS periodEnd, w.trigger_value AS triggerValue, w.trigger_desc AS triggerDesc, DATE_FORMAT(w.warning_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS warningTime, (SELECT nickname FROM user_info WHERE userId = w.member_id) AS memberName, (SELECT phone FROM user_info WHERE userId = w.member_id) AS memberMobile, (SELECT coach_name FROM pt_coach WHERE id = w.coach_id) AS coachName, (SELECT storeName FROM store WHERE storeId = w.store_id) AS storeName

sql.if: AND w.member_id IN (SELECT userId FROM user_info WHERE nickname LIKE concat('%', #{memberKeyword}, '%') OR phone LIKE concat('%', #{memberKeyword}, '%'))
AND w.coach_id IN (SELECT id FROM pt_coach WHERE coach_name LIKE concat('%', #{coachName}, '%'))

mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM pt_exception_warning_record w WHERE DATE(w.warning_time) = CURDATE() AND w.store_id IN (${storeIds}) ) AS todayNew, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM pt_exception_warning_record w WHERE w.warning_type = 1 AND w.store_id IN (${storeIds}) ) AS frequentCancel, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM pt_exception_warning_record w WHERE w.warning_type = 2 AND w.store_id IN (${storeIds}) ) AS lessonAbnormal, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM pt_exception_warning_rule WHERE status = 1) AS enabledRuleCount
